The '''''Moulee-rah Patogga''''' was a freighter. Its captain was [[Barada Rakul]], and it held a crew of five. Prior to the breakout of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the vessel was seized after it was discovered to be carrying one hundred metric tons of [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]]. Though the vessel was owned by the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]], [[Aruk Besadii Aora]] claimed that they had sold it to [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] thirty years earlier. [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]] disputed these claims, though he had initially accused the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] of entrapment before he discovered the vessel was owned by Besadii.
